positive: A highly detailed, minimalist geometric scene featuring interlocking stylized planets and celestial bodies forming a nebula pattern. The main subject is a symmetrical arrangement of cosmic gears and orrery elements. Style should be a blend of Art Deco and bioluminescent scientific illustration, giving it a clean, sophisticated, and fantastical feel. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, emerald green, luminous gold, and stark white accents. The composition must be centered, designed for apparel printing, with clear, crisp silhouettes and strong contrast against a subtle, gradient cosmic background. Highly detailed linework, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing, emblem design, maximal symmetry, clean lines, sci-fi elegance, cosmic journey.
